items.prompt: plots measurement values on a line plot using a consistent scale and correct repeated marks
items.expected_evidence: place X marks correctly above measurement values on a line plot
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner completes the representation task accurately.

items.prompt: reads and compares frequency at marked values including clustered or repeated measurements
items.expected_evidence: interpret repeated measures and identify most/least frequent values
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains what the display shows and how to read it.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to measurement_scale_disconnect.
items.expected_evidence: use the line plot to answer additive and comparison questions
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies the error source and states the correct interpretation.

items.prompt: succeeds across whole-number and fraction-marked measurement contexts
items.expected_evidence: connect fraction-marked measurement positions to plotted data accurately
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner succeeds in the less-familiar data context.
